description_long: This is a small, rectangular fence section with four vertical posts connected by two horizontal rails, forming a simple and utilitarian barrier. The posts are evenly spaced and appear to be made of a metallic material, likely steel or aluminum, with a matte finish. The fence is set within a larger, brown-walled enclosure, suggesting it is intended as a boundary or divider within an urban or landscaped environment. The top edge of the fence is flat, with no visible decorative elements or post caps. The rails are straight and parallel, providing structural support and a clear visual boundary. The overall design is minimalistic, prioritizing function over ornamentation.
description: A small, rectangular metal fence section with four posts and two horizontal rails, featuring a flat top and a simple, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: The fence is seen from above and slightly behind, showing its rectangular shape and the arrangement of posts and rails within a brown-walled enclosure.
description_view_1: The fence is barely visible from the side, with the brown enclosure walls dominating the view and only the top edge of the fence faintly discernible.
description_view_2: The opposite side view shows the fence as a thin line, with the enclosure walls again prominent and the fence's structure minimally visible.
description_view_3: A top-down perspective similar to view 0, but from the opposite direction, clearly displaying the fence's rectangular layout and post arrangement.
